scope_summary: macOS-parity guard of retired op-081-R on the NOTIFYD_TWQ_TRACE servicing invariant. Field-level dispatch_*.json parity explicitly deferred to op-089 by Arranger op-085 scope; guarded on what op-084 proved.

validated_op.commit_subject: dispatch: service Mach receive through TWQ workqueues

explorer_evidence.ledger_commit_subject: op-084: record rx dispatch servicing-invariant parity (block-078 smoke)
explorer_evidence.run_mode: runtime-smoke (catalog-mode); 0 attempts, 0 marker-authority changes, 0 disposed evidence

macos_reference.reference_commit_subject: op-082: macOS-27 dispatch/MACH_RECV reference (op-081-R validation suite)
macos_reference.servicing_invariant: DISPATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_MACH_RECV source fires on port readiness; handler services the message via mach_msg(MACH_RCV_MSG); handler_fired_and_serviced=true (mach_msg_receive_in_handler returned KERN_SUCCESS)

markers.note: Marker carries lines=45 source=LIBPTHREAD_TWQ_TRACE — self-certifying: only emittable if KWQ enabled and 45 trace lines actually observed. op-084 evidence recorded 'count 1' (marker-line count); the marker payload is stronger than the evidence file captured.

first_hand_verification.hard_stop_scan: clean (no panic:|Fatal trap|KASSERT|lock order reversal|dispatch assert|Bad system call|Signal 12|BUG in libdispatch)
first_hand_verification.teardown: clean per op-084 evidence; run artifacts present and intact for this verification

parity_basis: rmxOS services a Mach-receive event through dispatch + TWQ workqueues (BLOCK078_NOTIFYD_TWQ_TRACE lines=45 source=LIBPTHREAD_TWQ_TRACE + BLOCK078_NOTIFYD_ROUNDTRIP + clean hard-stop + rc=0/0), matching the macOS-27 servicing invariant recorded in op-082 (MACH_RECV source -> handler services via mach_msg RCV, handler_fired_and_serviced=true).

coverage_caveats.field_level_json_parity: NOT covered. op-084 produced no rx dispatch_*.json vectors; no field-by-field diff vs mx-a64z dispatch_*.json performed. Deferred to op-089 (macos-validation-dispatch in-guest staging). Not gating per Arranger op-085 scope.
coverage_caveats.marker_emission_falsifier: NOT first-hand verified by gatekeeper. The block-078 TWQ_TRACE marker-emission logic (whether status=0 requires lines>0) is the Explorer's marker-authority domain. Acceptance rests on the marker payload (lines=45 source=LIBPTHREAD_TWQ_TRACE) being self-certifying of actual observation, not on re-validating marker authority.
coverage_caveats.guest_root: Empty post-run (cleaned); could not inspect staged rc.local / service env directly. KWQ-enabled condition inferred from marker payload firing with 45 trace lines, which requires LIBDISPATCH_DISABLE_KWQ unset.

decision.basis: Serial-hash immutability verified first-hand (re-hash = pin = claim, 27999f61...); all five markers at status=0 with TWQ_TRACE carrying lines=45 source=LIBPTHREAD_TWQ_TRACE; stage_rc=0 run_rc=0; hard-stop scan clean; macOS-27 servicing invariant (op-082) defined and matched at the servicing-invariant level. Guarded on what op-084 proved, per Arranger op-085 scope.
decision.retirement_lane: Gatekeeper (macOS-parity) lane only. Op retire is the Validators (GLM+DS4P) quality-validation lane at >=8/10 + agreement, Arbiter on conflict. This disposition is the macOS-faithfulness input to retire, not retire itself.
